creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
On Tue, Dec 15, 2009 at 06:49:22AM +0000, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
> 
> >Submitter-Id:	current-users
> >Originator:	Philip M. Gollucci
> >Organization:	RideCharge Inc.
> >Confidential:	no 
> >Synopsis:	[PATCH] devel/p5-SDL: update to 2.2.0
> >Severity:	non-critical
> >Priority:	low
> >Category:	ports 
> >Class:		update
> >Release:	FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT amd64
> >Environment:
> System: FreeBSD frieza.p6m7g8.net 9.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT #0: Tue Dec  8 02:25:55 UTC
> >Description:
> - Update to 2.2.0
> 
> Port maintainer (spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua) is cc'd.
> 
> Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
> >How-To-Repeat:
> >Fix:
First of all thanks for Your work.
Problem is that 2.2.0 not fully compatible with 2.1.3
I was trying to contact with sdlperl author a few month ago,
but still not received a reply.
Since the only port in the tree which uses sdlperl - games/frozenbubble seems
not affected by regression, I suggest You to commit this update anyway.
Also please remove line
${ECHO_MSG} "or launch any program that use this port with LD_PRELOAD=/usr/lib/libc_r.so",
libc_r is deprecated.


--
Adios
